Description.Value: Self-join regression fixture: tblCurrencyExchange aliased to a/b for cross-rate pairs. Verifies that aliased input tables round-trip with their Alias = lines preserved in .qdef. Without the alias, MSysQueries Attribute 7 collapses leftTable == rightTable and BuildJoinChain crashes on re-export.

Self-join regression fixture: tblCurrencyExchange aliased to a/b for cross-rate pairs. Verifies that aliased input tables round-trip with their Alias = lines preserved in .qdef. Without the alias, MSysQueries Attribute 7 collapses leftTable == rightTable and BuildJoinChain crashes on re-export.
